name: Electronic Artefacts
description: Electronic Artefacts designs digital products, knowledge systems, cultural platforms and research-led experiences.

records.title: Electronic Artefacts
records.summary: Electronic Artefacts connects research, software, design, cultural production and archival practice through a shared graph of projects, programs and knowledge.

records.title: ORETH
records.summary: A public program record for ORETH as both an audio research system and the technical-cultural layer connected to Palimpsests.

records.title: VASTE
records.summary: VASTE connects Runtime Theory to implemented graph systems and can be evaluated through scoped repository access, technical pilots, implementation work and licensing conversations.

records.title: Palimpsests
records.summary: A canonical project record for Palimpsests as a compound audio, visual and research publication within Electronic Artefacts.

records.title: Vestiges
records.summary: A knowledge-first product where provenance, contribution, discovery and professional services grow from one historized graph.

records.title: Runtime Theory
records.summary: An active Electronic Artefacts research field connecting early VOID experiments, VASTE and the definition of graph runtime.

records.title: AI Agents vs AI Workflows
records.summary: Understand the difference between AI agents and AI workflows, when to use each architecture, and how to design reliable hybrid systems.

records.title: AI Search, Structured Content and Knowledge Graph SEO
records.summary: Understand how AI search changes SEO strategy through helpful content, structured data, crawlable pages, entity identity and knowledge graph architecture.
tags: AI Search, Structured Content and Knowledge Graph SEO

records.title: Algorithmic Composition and Rule-Based Music
records.summary: A technical article on algorithmic composition, rule-based music, generative sound, cybernetics and Electronic Artefacts audio research.

records.title: C2PA Content Credentials and Generative Media Provenance
records.summary: Understand C2PA and Content Credentials for media provenance, generative AI labelling, archive trust and cultural production workflows.
tags: C2PA Content Credentials and Generative Media Provenance

records.title: Contextual Execution and Graph Runtimes
records.summary: A technical article connecting contextual execution, graph runtime, Runtime Theory and VASTE.

records.title: Creative Coding Pedagogy from Logo to p5.js
records.summary: A technical article on teaching creative coding, Processing, p5.js, computational media, open source and Electronic Artefacts learning culture.
tags: Creative Coding Pedagogy from Logo to p5.js

records.title: Digital Preservation and Living Archives
records.summary: A technical article on digital preservation, living archives, file formats, provenance and Electronic Artefacts cultural records.

records.title: Event-Driven Architecture and Event Streams
records.summary: Learn event-driven architecture through event streams, delivery guarantees, schema evolution, idempotency, projections and runtime design.

records.title: Foundational Lineage #001
records.summary: A concise record of the foundational research lineage connecting information architecture, taxonomy, runtime systems and public knowledge structures.

records.title: Generative AI, Latent Space and Creative Workflows
records.summary: A technical article on generative AI, latent space, creative workflows, provenance, augmented intelligence and responsible production.
tags: Generative AI, Latent Space and Creative Workflows

records.title: Generative Systems, Cybernetics and Creative Coding
records.summary: A technical article on generative systems, cybernetic feedback, creative coding, algorithmic composition and Electronic Artefacts projects.
tags: Generative Systems, Cybernetics and Creative Coding

records.title: How Large Language Models Actually Work
records.summary: Learn how LLMs work, from tokenization and training to attention, context windows, decoding, hallucinations, tools and evaluation.
tags: How Large Language Models Actually Work

records.title: Human Computer Interaction for Creative Tools
records.summary: A technical article on HCI, creative tools, interface design, augmented intelligence, accessibility and Electronic Artefacts systems.
tags: Human Computer Interaction for Creative Tools

records.title: Hypertext and Augmented Knowledge Systems
records.summary: A technical article on hypertext, augmented intelligence, linked pages, knowledge graphs and Electronic Artefacts knowledge publishing.

records.title: IIIF and Compound Cultural Objects
records.summary: Understand IIIF as presentation infrastructure for compound cultural objects, archives, manifests, canvases and annotations.

records.title: Knowledge Graphs for Cultural Infrastructure
records.summary: A technical article on knowledge graphs, cultural heritage, provenance and public knowledge pages, connected to Vestiges and the Electronic Artefacts graph.

records.title: Linked Data and Public Knowledge Pages
records.summary: A technical article on Linked Data, JSON-LD, canonical URLs, identifiers and SEO for static knowledge platforms.
tags: Linked Data and Public Knowledge Pages

records.title: Local and Open Source AI Systems
records.summary: Understand local AI and open-source AI systems, including model weights, quantization, llama.cpp, privacy, hardware and licensing.
tags: Local and Open Source AI Systems

records.title: Metadata, Cataloguing and Cultural Memory
records.summary: A technical article on metadata, cataloguing, cultural memory, preservation standards and Electronic Artefacts graph records.

records.title: Microservices, Modular Monoliths and System Boundaries
records.summary: Learn when microservices make sense, why modular monoliths are often the better starting point, and how to define durable system boundaries.
tags: Microservices, Modular Monoliths and System Boundaries

records.title: Model Context Protocol and Tool-Using AI Systems
records.summary: Understand Model Context Protocol through hosts, clients, servers, resources, prompts, tools, security boundaries and contextual execution.
tags: Model Context Protocol and Tool-Using AI Systems

records.title: Motion Design, Time and Interface Semantics
records.summary: A technical article on motion design, web animation, interface state, accessibility and temporal visual systems.
tags: Motion Design, Time and Interface Semantics

records.title: Multimodal AI Across Text, Image, Audio and Video
records.summary: Learn how multimodal AI connects text, images, audio and video, and how to evaluate cross-modal systems for creative and cultural use.
tags: Multimodal AI Across Text, Image, Audio and Video

records.title: Observability for AI Agents and Tool-Calling Systems
records.summary: Understand observability for AI agents and tool-calling systems through traces, metrics, logs, audit events and OpenTelemetry.
tags: Observability for AI Agents and Tool-Calling Systems

records.title: Ontologies, Taxonomies and Knowledge Modeling
records.summary: Understand the differences between taxonomies and ontologies and learn how to design a durable knowledge model without overengineering.

records.title: Open Source as Cultural Infrastructure
records.summary: A technical article on open source software, maintainership, creative coding, infrastructure and Electronic Artefacts knowledge culture.

records.title: Personal Knowledge Systems and Digital Gardens
records.summary: A technical article on personal knowledge systems, digital gardens, backlinks, research memory and public knowledge hubs.
tags: Personal Knowledge Systems and Digital Gardens

records.title: Procedural Graphics, Shaders and Visual Systems
records.summary: A technical article on procedural graphics, shaders, WebGL, creative coding and generative visual systems.
tags: Procedural Graphics, Shaders and Visual Systems

records.title: Prompt Injection and Trust Boundaries in AI Knowledge Systems
records.summary: Understand prompt injection in AI knowledge systems through retrieval, agents, MCP tools, permissions, untrusted content and contextual execution.
tags: Prompt Injection and Trust Boundaries in AI Knowledge Systems

records.title: Redis Streams for Orchestration
records.summary: Learn how Redis Streams works and how to use consumer groups, pending entries and idempotent workers for reliable orchestration.

records.title: Responsible AI Governance for Creative and Cultural Systems
records.summary: Learn how responsible AI governance applies to creative technology, cultural infrastructure, archives, generative media and AI-assisted knowledge workflows.
tags: Responsible AI Governance for Creative and Cultural Systems

records.title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation and Knowledge Systems
records.summary: Learn how retrieval-augmented generation works and how to build source-grounded RAG systems with metadata, knowledge graphs and evaluation.

records.title: Runtime Engines and Domain Operating Systems
records.summary: Understand runtime engines and domain operating systems, and how shared entities, permissions and events can support many applications.
tags: Runtime Engines and Domain Operating Systems

records.title: Signal Archaeology, Audio Memory and Machine Listening
records.summary: A technical article on signal archaeology, audio memory, machine listening, ORETH and Palimpsests.
tags: Signal Archaeology, Audio Memory and Machine Listening

records.title: Systems Thinking for Creative Practice
records.summary: Learn systems thinking through creative practice, software, studios and cultural projects, with practical mapping and intervention methods.

records.title: Typography, Reading Systems and Digital Interfaces
records.summary: A technical article on typography, reading systems, web interfaces, accessibility and Electronic Artefacts editorial design.
tags: Typography, Reading Systems and Digital Interfaces

records.title: Verifiable Credentials for Cultural Archives and Creator Identity
records.summary: Understand how verifiable credentials can support creator identity, archive provenance, rights workflows and trusted claims in cultural knowledge systems.
tags: Verifiable Credentials for Cultural Archives and Creator Identity

records.title: Web Audio and Browser-Based Sound Systems
records.summary: A technical article on Web Audio, audio graphs, browser sound, ORETH, machine listening and interactive media.
tags: Web Audio and Browser-Based Sound Systems

records.title: WebNN and Local AI in the Browser
records.summary: Understand WebNN as a browser API for hardware-accelerated neural-network inference and local AI interaction design.
tags: WebNN and Local AI in the Browser

records.title: Why Graphs Are More Powerful Than Folders
records.summary: Learn when graph models outperform folder hierarchies, why relationships matter, and how to keep folders as useful projections over connected data.
tags: Why Graphs Are More Powerful Than Folders

records.title: AI Agent
records.summary: An AI agent is a software system in which a model can select actions, use tools, observe results and adapt its next steps toward an objective within defined boundaries.

records.title: Algorithmic Composition
records.summary: Algorithmic composition is the use of rules, procedures, probability, computation or formal systems to generate or organize musical material.

records.title: Augmented Intelligence
records.summary: Augmented intelligence is the design of tools, interfaces and systems that expand human perception, reasoning, memory and creative capability.

records.title: Autonomous System
records.summary: An autonomous system can perceive relevant state, select actions and adapt behavior toward objectives with limited direct human control during operation.

records.title: Contextual Execution
records.summary: Contextual execution is the practice of making identity, state, permissions, relationships and operating context active constraints on what a system can do.

records.title: Creative Coding
records.summary: Creative coding is the use of programming as an artistic, design or exploratory medium rather than only as an engineering implementation tool.

records.title: Cybernetic Feedback
records.summary: Cybernetic feedback is the circulation of information about a system's state back into the system so that behavior can be regulated, adapted or transformed.

records.title: Digital Preservation
records.summary: Digital preservation is the long-term work of keeping digital objects understandable, authentic, usable and accessible despite changes in formats, software, hardware and context.

records.title: Domain Operating System
records.summary: A domain operating system is a shared runtime and information layer that coordinates identities, entities, permissions, workflows, events and interfaces for a specific field of activity.

records.title: Entity Identity
records.summary: Entity identity is the durable naming of a person, concept, project, program, publication or artefact so that references remain stable as descriptions evolve.

records.title: Event-Driven Architecture
records.summary: Event-driven architecture is a system design approach in which components publish, transport and react to records of state change rather than depending only on direct synchronous calls.

records.title: Generative AI
records.summary: Generative AI refers to machine-learning systems that produce or transform media such as text, image, audio, video, code or structured data from learned patterns.

records.title: Generative System
records.summary: A generative system is a rule-based, procedural or computational arrangement that produces variable outputs from defined constraints, materials and processes.

records.title: Graph Modeling
records.summary: Graph modeling represents a domain through addressable nodes, typed relationships and properties chosen to answer specific questions and support specific operations.

records.title: Graph Runtime
records.summary: A graph runtime is an execution environment in which addressable entities and typed relationships participate directly in contextual computation.

records.title: Human Computer Interaction
records.summary: Human computer interaction is the study and design of relationships between people, computational systems, interfaces, tasks, environments and cultures of use.

records.title: Hypertext
records.summary: Hypertext is a system of non-linear text and media connected by links, allowing readers and machines to traverse knowledge through associations.

records.title: Internet Culture
records.summary: Internet culture is the set of social forms, aesthetics, protocols, communities, memes, archives and practices that emerge through networked communication.

records.title: Knowledge Graph
records.summary: A knowledge graph is a structured network of entities, identifiers and typed relationships that makes knowledge navigable, queryable and reusable across contexts.

records.title: Large Language Model
records.summary: A large language model is a parameterized machine-learning model trained to predict and generate sequences of tokens from statistical patterns learned across large text or multimodal corpora.

records.title: Linked Data
records.summary: Linked Data is a web publishing approach that identifies things with stable URIs and connects them through machine-readable statements.

records.title: Metadata
records.summary: Metadata is structured information about a resource, such as title, creator, date, format, source, rights, subject, relation and preservation context.

records.title: Microservice Architecture
records.summary: Microservice architecture structures a software system as independently deployable services aligned with bounded capabilities and communicating through explicit contracts.

records.title: Motion Design
records.summary: Motion design is the use of time, movement, transition, rhythm and sequencing to structure visual communication and interface behavior.

records.title: Multimodal AI
records.summary: Multimodal AI describes systems that learn from, align, transform or generate more than one modality such as text, image, audio, video, sensor data or structured records.

records.title: Ontology
records.summary: In knowledge engineering, an ontology is an explicit specification of the kinds of entities, properties, relationships and constraints used to represent a domain.

records.title: Open Source
records.summary: Open source is a software and cultural practice in which source code is made available under licenses that allow use, study, modification and redistribution.

records.title: Open-Weight Model
records.summary: An open-weight model is a machine-learning model whose learned parameters are distributed for reuse under stated terms, without necessarily providing the training data, training code or freedoms required by...

records.title: Personal Knowledge System
records.summary: A personal knowledge system is a practice and tool environment for capturing, linking, revising and retrieving notes, sources, ideas and decisions over time.

records.title: Procedural Graphics
records.summary: Procedural graphics are images or visual systems generated from rules, algorithms, parameters, simulation or code rather than only manually drawn assets.

records.title: Provenance
records.summary: Provenance is information about the people, activities, sources, transformations and decisions involved in producing a thing or piece of data.

records.title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation
records.summary: Retrieval-augmented generation is an architecture that retrieves external information at query time and supplies selected evidence to a generative model before or during response production.

records.title: Signal Archaeology
records.summary: Signal archaeology is the interpretation of technical, sonic, visual or archival traces as evidence of hidden processes, transformations and histories.

records.title: Systems Thinking
records.summary: Systems thinking is an approach that studies elements through their relationships, feedback, boundaries, delays, stocks, flows and patterns of behavior over time.

records.title: Typography
records.summary: Typography is the design and arrangement of written language through typefaces, spacing, hierarchy, rhythm, scale and reading conditions.

records.title: Web Audio
records.summary: Web audio is the use of browser-based audio APIs and related web technologies to synthesize, process, analyze, route and present sound.

records.title: ActivityPub
records.summary: A technology record for federated network culture and social web infrastructure.

records.title: C2PA
records.summary: A technology record for C2PA and Content Credentials as provenance infrastructure for digital media.
tags: Coalition for Content Provenance and Authenticity

records.title: CloudEvents
records.summary: A technology record for interoperable event metadata across services and platforms.

records.title: CSS Fonts
records.summary: A technology record for browser typography and reading systems.

records.title: IIIF
records.summary: A technology record for IIIF as interoperable presentation infrastructure for compound cultural objects.

records.title: JSON-LD
records.summary: A technology record for JSON-LD as the structured data format used by Electronic Artefacts canonical pages.

records.title: llama.cpp
records.summary: A technology record for local model inference, quantization and portable AI deployment.

records.title: Model Context Protocol
records.summary: A technology record for MCP as an integration protocol for tool-using AI applications, resources and contextual workflows.

records.title: OpenTelemetry
records.summary: A technology record for OpenTelemetry as telemetry infrastructure for distributed systems and AI tool workflows.

records.title: OWL
records.summary: A technology record for formal ontology publication and reasoning.

records.title: RDF
records.summary: A technology record for RDF as a reference model behind knowledge graphs, Linked Data and semantic publication.

records.title: Redis Streams
records.summary: A technology record for event streams, orchestration and real-time processing.

records.title: SKOS
records.summary: A technology record for controlled vocabularies and lightweight semantic organization.

records.title: Transformer Architecture
records.summary: A technology record for the architecture underlying many modern language and multimodal models.

records.title: Web Animations
records.summary: A technology record for animation timing, synchronization and interface motion on the web.

records.title: Web Audio API
records.summary: A technology record for browser-native audio processing and synthesis.

records.title: WebGL
records.summary: A technology record for browser graphics and shader-based visual systems.

records.title: WebNN
records.summary: A technology record for browser-based machine-learning inference through the Web Neural Network API.

records.title: Knowledge Hub Foundations
records.summary: A curated collection grouping foundational Knowledge Hub concepts, technologies, programs, projects and publications.

records.title: Knowledge Hub Fourth Wave
records.summary: A curated Electronic Artefacts collection about AI tool protocols, media provenance, browser-local inference, archive presentation, agent observability, governance and knowledge graph SEO.

records.title: Knowledge Hub Second Wave
records.summary: A curated collection for the second Knowledge Hub expansion wave.

records.title: Knowledge Hub Third Wave
records.summary: A curated Electronic Artefacts collection about durable AI and systems architecture.
